summary: This is a brief announcement post directing readers to a YouTube video of Joel Spolsky's FogBugz/Kiln world tour presentation. The post contains virtually no substantive content beyond the link and a tip about viewing quality. It serves purely as a promotional notice for Fog Creek Software's product demo tour.
key_points: FogBugz/Kiln world tour presentation was recorded and posted to YouTube
Joel recommends the 720p option for clearer screen visibility
key_insight: This is a minimal promotional post with no substantive analysis or insight — purely a product demo announcement.
